suppress.notes: We don't consume externally provided Yaml files, only from trusted internal sources. -- SnakeYaml's Constructor() class does not restrict types which can be instantiated during deserialization.

We don't use socket appenders in our logging configuration. -- The Socket Appender in Apache Log4j Core versions 2.0-beta9 through 2.25.2 does not perform TLS hostname verification of the peer certificate.
